subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims in June 1906
subcodes.first_line: Certain officials in the City have requested me to write a petition for them to use before the higher authorities to bring about my release from incarceration.
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @effort; striving, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @disregarding bodily comfort
